updateCmd: kitty -e bash -c 'echo -e "[1;34m📦 INICIANDO A ATUALIZAÇÃO DO SISTEMA + LIMPEZA[0m"; echo ==========================================; echo -e "[0;33m-> Capturando lista de atualizações...[0m"; PACMAN_PRE_UPDATE=$(checkupdates 2>/dev/null || true); AUR_PRE_UPDATE=$(yay -Qqum 2>/dev/null || true); echo; echo -e "[1;33m-> Repositórios[0m"; sudo pacman -Su --noconfirm 2>&1; echo; echo -e "[1;33m-> AUR[0m"; if yay -Sua --noconfirm 2>&1; then true; else echo -e "[0;33mBatch falhou, tentando individual...[0m"; yay -Qqum 2>/dev/null | while read -r pkg; do echo -e "[0;33m  -> $pkg[0m"; yay -S "$pkg" --noconfirm 2>&1 || echo -e "[0;31m  -> $pkg ignorado (requer intervenção manual)[0m"; done; fi; echo; echo -e "[0;36m-> Flatpaks[0m"; flatpak update -y 2>&1; echo; echo -e "[1;33m🧹 Limpando o Sistema...[0m"; echo ==========================================; CACHE_RESULT=$(paccache -r -k 3 2>&1); echo -e "[0;36m-> Cache (paccache)[0m"; echo "$CACHE_RESULT"; echo; echo -e "[0;36m-> Cache AUR[0m"; yay -Sc --noconfirm 2>/dev/null; echo; echo -e "[0;36m-> Build AUR[0m"; yay -Yc --noconfirm 2>/dev/null; echo; echo -e "[0;36m-> Órfãos[0m"; pacman -Qdtq 2>/dev/null | xargs -r sudo pacman -Rns --noconfirm 2>&1; echo; echo -e "[0;36m-> Flatpaks não usados[0m"; flatpak uninstall --unused --delete-data -y 2>&1; echo; echo -e "[0;36m-> Logs[0m"; journalctl --vacuum-time=7d 2>&1; echo; echo -e "[0;36m-> Cache do usuário[0m"; find ~/.cache -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 ! -name noctalia ! -name noctalia-qs ! -name fontconfig ! -name dolphin ! -name wofi-drun ! -name thumbnails ! -name lutris ! -name ZapZap ! -name swww ! -name yay -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true; echo; echo ==========================================; echo -e "[0;32m✅ Sistema atualizado e limpo![0m"; echo ""; CLEAN_SUMMARY=$(echo "$CACHE_RESULT" | awk -F"[()]" "/saved/{print \$2}"); if [[ -n "$CLEAN_SUMMARY" ]]; then echo -e "[0;36m🧹 $CLEAN_SUMMARY[0m"; fi; echo ""; echo "================================================="; echo -e "[0;36mLOG DE PACOTES ATUALIZADOS (Pacman & AUR):[0m"; echo "================================================="; if [[ -z "$PACMAN_PRE_UPDATE" && -z "$AUR_PRE_UPDATE" ]]; then echo "Nenhuma atualização foi detectada antes da execução."; else if [[ -n "$PACMAN_PRE_UPDATE" ]]; then echo -e "[0;36m--- Pacman ---[0m"; echo "$PACMAN_PRE_UPDATE" | awk -v G="[0;32m" -v C="[0m" "{ print G \$0 C }"; fi; if [[ -n "$AUR_PRE_UPDATE" ]]; then echo; echo -e "[0;36m--- AUR ---[0m"; echo "$AUR_PRE_UPDATE" | awk -v G="[0;32m" -v C="[0m" "{ print G \$0 C }"; fi; fi; echo "================================================="; echo ""; rm -f "$LOG_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; echo Pressione Enter para fechar...; read -n 1'
cleanupCmd: paccache -r -k 3 2>/dev/null; yay -Sc --noconfirm 2>/dev/null; yay -Yc --noconfirm 2>/dev/null; orphans=$(pacman -Qdtq 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$orphans" ] && sudo pacman -Rns $orphans --noconfirm 2>/dev/null || true; flatpak uninstall --unused --delete-data -y 2>/dev/null; journalctl --vacuum-time=7d 2>/dev/null
cachePreserveList: noctalia noctalia-qs fontconfig dolphin wofi-drun thumbnails lutris ZapZap swww yay
